name: Irons & Oak
about: Irons & Oak is an indoor sports simulation venue and upscale lounge in Auburn, IL, featuring an HD multisport simulator that offers a variety of activities including golf, archery, shooting, bowling, and more. The venue combines cutting-edge technology with a high-end lounge atmosphere, allowing patrons to engage in realistic gameplay while enjoying craft cocktails, premium bourbons, and top-shelf spirits. Each booking session lasts 60 minutes, with options to book multiple back-to-back slots, and the facility is designed to accommodate both casual outings and private events for up to 30 guests.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art HD multisport simulator with pinpoint accuracy
Upscale lounge atmosphere perfect for casual hangouts or memorable evenings
Premium food and drink options including craft cocktails and high-end bourbons
Ability to book private parties for up to 30 guests
Walk-ins welcome with advanced booking options to guarantee availability

food_and_drink.notes: No food allowed inside the simulator bay; designated areas for eating are provided
Curated list of premium bourbons, craft cocktails, top-shelf spirits, and brews

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are responsible for bringing your own clubs; ensure they are clean and follow the venue's rules regarding club usage.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks into the simulator?
faq.answer: No food or drinks are allowed inside the simulator bay; drinks are welcome in the bay viewing area, and designated areas are available for eating and drinking.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each booking session is 60 minutes; you can book multiple back-to-back slots if you want more time, and the time to complete 18 holes will depend on your pace and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Children under the age of 13 are not allowed without supervision from a non-golfing adult.
